chapter_goal: Extract Gaussian, mean, and principal curvatures from the shape operator and use them to inspect constant K, flat, constant H, and compact-surface behavior.

library_routing.why: exact determinant, trace, and characteristic-polynomial checks
durable labeled polar figure for principal directions
static inspectable comparison of elliptic, hyperbolic, parabolic, and planar models
rotatable 3D surface family stored as a standalone HTML artifact
exact rational identity plus sampled visual bridge between H and K

source_span.book: Andrew Pressley, Elementary Differential Geometry, Second Edition
source_span.chapter: Chapter 8: Gaussian, mean and principal curvatures
source_span.source_use: orientation only; notebook prose, code, and visuals are original
